items.title: Claude in the user stack
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  user["You (chat or code)"]
  apps["Claude apps & API"]
  models["Claude model family"]
  infra["Anthropic / partner cloud infrastructure"]
  user --> apps --> models --> infra
items.caption: You interact with apps or APIs; models run on managed infrastructure—you do not host the weights locally in the default setup.

items.title: Assistant vs model
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  assistant["Claude assistant\n(chat, API session)"]
  model["Claude model\n(Opus / Sonnet / Haiku)"]
  assistant -->|"powered by"| model
items.caption: The assistant is the experience; the model is the engine. API calls name a specific model; chat apps pick one for you (often with a default or plan-based choice).
